summary: Completed frontend testing of simplified board selection page. All core requirements verified successfully.

integration_issues.issue: Board buttons remain purple after selection instead of turning green when returning from game page

passed_tests: Header shows Active Game: 0, Stake, and Start in: waiting
All 100 board buttons (1-100) are displayed and clickable
Start Game button is correctly removed
Board click shows toast notification 'Board X selected!'
Board click redirects to game page immediately
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix board state persistence: Selected boards should turn green and show selection indicator when returning to board selection page. Currently boards reset to purple/available state.
